title: Lalitpur - The Kathmandu Post
summary: How a wrong number led to a deadly street clash in Lalitpur By Gaurav Pokharel A misdialled call escalated into insults, a face-to-face meeting and a sudden street fight in Mangalbazar that ended with two brothers being killed. RSP’s Jagdish Kharel wins Lalitpur-2 by wide margin By Post Report Former communications minister secures 39,491 votes, defeating Nepali Congress rival Prem Krishna Maharja
content:
How a wrong number led to a deadly street clash in Lalitpur By Gaurav Pokharel A misdialled call escalated into insults, a face-to-face meeting and a sudden street fight in Mangalbazar that ended with two brothers being killed. RSP’s Jagdish Kharel wins Lalitpur-2 by wide margin By Post Report Former communications minister secures 39,491 votes, defeating Nepali Congress rival Prem Krishna Maharjan. Nepali Congress’ Udaya Shumsher Rana leads in Lalitpur-1 By Post Report Rana ahead of UML’s Chetanath Sanjel in early vote count. SSP Hobindra Bogati takes charge as Lalitpur police chief By Post Report Police officials expect his experience to strengthen law and order and curb crime in the district. Koshi Province minister’s vehicle knocks down girl in Lalitpur By Post Report Residents block road after accident involving provincial minister’s vehicle. Patan High Court upholds detention of former Madhesh Province head Rajesh Jha By Post Report Court rejects Jha’s appeal against Kathmandu District Court’s custody order. Eight indicted in Miteri Cooperative fraud. Key accused Jyoti Gurung still at large By Post Report On Monday, Lalitpur District Court began hearing the case, which will conclude today. Zonta Club Kathmandu and Jane Goodall Institute Nepal launch tree plantation drive By Post Report The campaign links gender equality and climate action. Smugglers attempt to steal red panda from Central Zoo By Post Report Police say two men breached zoo security and entered the enclosure where the red panda was kept. Man killed in Lalitpur By Post Report The attacker used khukuri after calling the victim to meet. House catches fire in Lalitpur By Post Report Municipal fire brigade extinguish fire that broke out in a house in Civil Homes. Police arrest 53 in online gambling bust in Lalitpur By Post Report Two Indian nationals among those held; laptops and mobile phones seized. CIAA files graft case against 14 including Godawari mayor By Post Report The anti-graft body charges them for causing Rs1.04 billion revenue loss while approving tenders for extraction of sands and stones. Man injured in forest fire dies By Post Report The man died while undergoing treatment at the Kirtipur-based Nepal Cleft and Burn Centre, police say. Summit Apartments land subsidence issue enters Parliament By Post Report Lalitpur Metropolitan City said Wednesday it moved two affected households. A team of engineers to assess damage caused by the illegal construction. Three arrested for producing and selling hooch By Post Report A police team from the police station in Kupandol of Lalitpur Metropolitan City arrested the individuals on Sunday during a regular liquor shop monitoring drive. To curb cholera, Lalitpur targets street food sellers. Not everyone is amused By Anup Ojha Panipuri and chatpate vendors could lose livelihoods. Experts stress better monitoring. Lalitpur launches animal ambulance service By Anup Ojha The City has handed over the veterinary ambulance to a non-profit animal shelter. The non-profit plans to use the ambulance to rescue street dogs and stray animals in need of attention. Two killed in oxygen cylinder explosion in Lalitpur By Post Report The blast occurred when workers were refilling oxygen cylinders at the plant in Patan Industrial Area. Lalitpur bans smoking in three areas By Anup Ojha Patan Durbar Square, Pulchowk and Jawalakhel have been declared smoking-free zones.
